name: Strong Currency
effect: Gain assistants additively based on Faction Coins found this Era.
formula: +(0.5 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2), where x is FC found this Era

name: Slave Trading
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Evil buildings owned.
formula: (2 * x ^ 0.7)%, where x is Evil buildings owned

name: Cheap Materials
effect: Tax Collection is worth more seconds based on buildings owned.

name: Black Market
effect: Production bonus from gems increased by 150%. Increase offline production based on Tax Collections cast this Era.
formula: (log10(1 + x) ^ 2)%, where x is Tax Collections this Era

name: Goblin Economists
effect: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration based on coins owned.
formula: (0.75 * log10(1 + x) ^ 1.25)%, where x is coins owned

name: Hobgoblin Gladiators
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Tax Collection seconds.
formula: (12 * ln(1 + x) ^ 3)%, where x is Tax Collection seconds

name: Goblin Central Bank
effect: Whenever you cast a spell, also cast a Tax Collection for free.

name: Fool's Gold
effect: Increase Faction Coin find chance based on highest Witch Conclaves owned this Reincarnation.
formula: floor(2 * x ^ 0.6)%, where x is highest Witch Conclaves this Reincarnation

name: Green Fingers Discount
effect: Gain coins randomly every 10 minutes (also offline) based on total production including spells.

name: Fools Gems
effect: Multiplicatively increase production bonus from Gems based on highest Slave Markets built this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.5 * x ^ 0.5)%, where x is highest Slave Markets this Reincarnation

name: Money is Magic
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on Tax Collections cast this Era.
formula: (2 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2)%, where x is Tax Collections this Era

name: Lousy Architecture
effect: Reduce Non-Unique building cost multiplier by 0.01 (becomes 1.14). Increase Non-Unique building production based on buildings of same tier.
formula: (x ^ 0.65)%, where x is buildings of same tier
